title: GahoodRPG
description: Adds RPG elements to minecraft which includes classes, armor, weapons, bosses, and more.
body:
![GahoodRPG](https://i.imgur.com/wsb4uex.png) ## General GahoodRPG is a mod that takes RPG elements and adds them to the vanilla Minecraft experience.
It is inspired by games like Terraria and MMORPGs such as Guild Wars 2 and WoW, but also heavily inspired by other mods such as [DivineRPG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/official-divinerpg) and [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks).

![Armors Ores & Items](https://imgur.com/vkp2fMp.png) GahoodRPG adds a plethora of new armors, items, and ores to mine. As of now, there are 3 tiers of items and armors to collect.

![Bosses and Hordes](https://imgur.com/xvv5k0n.png) In each of the tiered biomes, you'll find horde spawners waiting for you to tackle, and give you loot you'd otherwise find mining in the deep. Each tier in the game has easy, medium, and hard horde spawners; each with different loot and mobs to fight.

On top of this, there are 3 new bosses, and 10+ new mobs in the game.

![Choose Your Build](https://imgur.com/SPKTr65.png) GahoodRPG allows you to customize your build along the way. Want to focus on using a different spell? Just reset your class, and respec. Want to change your class? Simple, changing your class is a button click away.

### Compatibility Currently GahoodRPG is being updated and supported for the following versions of Minecraft **(Forge Only)** - 1.20.1 - 1.19.2 Any versions prior will not be ported to.
Any versions higher will likely be updated to and supported later as Forge becomes more stable and more interest arises for those later versions.
There are no plans for a Fabric version of this mod.
### Dependencies: - GeckoLib (required) - Curios (required) - JEI (optional)
